Description: Rename or update container/list metadata (e.g., description, visibility, note)
Move item between two user-defined containers (e.g., lists/playlists/watchlists/libraries/favorites/bookmarks)
Share container by adding collaborators or generating shareable link
Create/publish/post/submit content such as listing, posts, articles, media, for sharing or publication
Edit or update content such as listing, posts, articles, media, for sharing or publication
Delete content such as listing, posts, articles, media, for sharing or publication
Repost or share existing content to create a new post or listing
Upvote or endorse content such as listing, posts, articles, media
Save content such as listing, posts, articles, media to a personal collection or library
Write and submit review or rate an item, product, service, or experience
Subscribe to a content source (newsletter, podcast, creator, channel, feed)
Unsubscribe from an existing subscription to a content source (newsletter, podcast, creator, channel, feed)
Create a user-defined condition-based alert/saved search that notifies the user when new matching content appears
Modify user-defined condition-based alert conditions, delivery settings, or saved search parameters
Delete user-defined condition-based alert, saved search, or notification
Edit profile information such as name, bio, profile picture, and other personal details.
Update general personalization settings (language, currency, interests, recommendations, default choices, etc.)
Change contact details, including email, location, and phone number
Change address (delivery and pickup addresses) and payment settings on user's account
Join or renew paid membership. Does not include one-time purchases.
Change item quantity or options in cart
Complete purchase flow or place/create an order for the current shopping cart, including providing payment and delivery/pickup information, and reviewing and confirming the order
Apply discount coupon or promotional code.
Remove applied coupon or promotional code
Return or exchange items in an order
Change store preference or default store
Make reservation for a resource such as a seat, room, table, service or pass at a specified time
Modify reservation details such as time, date, or resource
Add reservation or booking to travel itinerary or plan
Create branch ruleset or tag ruleset
Send message, direct message, or inquiry to another user or group
Create log entry for tracking or organization purposes
Edit log entry for tracking or organization purposes
Delete log entry for tracking or organization purposes
Submit salary information for a job or position
Add professional certification or credential to profile
Add job experience entry to profile
Write and post recommendation for a connection
Send connection request to another user
Accept connection request from another user
